metadata.title: Build an SRX agent for finance operations in Latin America that processes overbroad one-pass lock inputs, validates compliance, and produces a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX agent for finance operations in Latin America that processes overbroad one-pass lock inputs, validates compliance, and produces a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Agent produces a valid SR8-compilable JSON with all five required sections.; Validation gates are explicitly documented in the output contract.; Overbroad one-pass lock inputs are resolved into bounded, auditable steps.; Artifact passes srxml_required_sections validation.

in_scope.item: The agent must ingest messy, urgent, partially constrained inputs from enterprise compliance leads, apply the compiler_lens to extract structured requirements, and output a compiled SR8 directive with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent produces a valid SR8-compilable JSON with all five required sections.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly documented in the output contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Overbroad one-pass lock inputs are resolved into bounded, auditable steps.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.mission_contract: Build an SRX agent for finance operations in Latin America that processes overbroad one-pass lock inputs, validates compliance, and produces a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

operating_rules.item: Must operate within Latin American regulatory frameworks (e.g., LGPD, COSO, local tax compliance).
Must handle ambiguous acceptance criteria and missing context without hallucination.
Must enforce validation gates at each stage of the one-pass lock process.
Must not expose raw financial data beyond governed artifact boundaries.

tool_policy.item: Use only declared tools and record tool limitations.

output_artifact_contract.item: sections: objective; scope; constraints; success_criteria; output_contract
validation_gates: gate_1: input_parsing_complete; gate_2: regulatory_check_passed; gate_3: ambiguity_resolved; gate_4: artifact_compiled
compliance_evidence: Latin America finance ops compliance checklist embedded in artifact metadata

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
